headline: Shares of financial services companies are trading higher after President Trump's social media post indicated that the U.S. will work closely with Iran, and the countries have already agreed to several key points in the proposed conflict-resolution plan. The sector is also benefiting from easing energy prices and lower Treasury yields, which are helping to alleviate inflation concerns and support overall market sentiment.
summary: Shares of financial services companies are trading higher after President Trump's social media post indicated that the U.S. will work closely with Iran, and the countries have already agreed to several key points in the proposed conflict-resolution plan. The sector is also benefiting from easing energy prices and lower Treasury yields, which are helping to alleviate inflation concerns and support overall market sentiment.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Global Payments, Lowers Price Target to $82
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Daniel R. Perlin   maintains Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) with a Sector Perform and lowers the price target from $97 to $82.
